# kshana SBOM conformance verdict vs official CycloneDX 1.5 schema
# oracle: CycloneDX 1.5 JSON Schema (Apache-2.0); SPDX list v1.0-3.21 (613 ids)
# validator: python jsonschema (Draft-07). Inputs = stdout of scripts/gen-sbom.sh.
# Lines are KEY value. See generator docstring for the honest scope.
bom_format CycloneDX
spec_version 1.5
component_count 59
spdx_enum_size 613
raw_schema_errors 52
normalized_schema_errors 0
compound_count 52
atomic_id_count 7
atomic_ids_invalid_count 0
atomic_ids_all_valid_spdx 1
sbom_sha256 3c7ecf9fd48931f6b4dd87f51cd35f7e3e738cd5ea74467a366f8c2c68d56028
atomic_id VALID AGPL-3.0-only
atomic_id VALID MIT
compound_id Apache-2.0 OR MIT
compound_id MIT OR Apache-2.0
compound_id Unlicense OR MIT
compound_id (MIT OR Apache-2.0) AND Unicode-3.0
compound_id MIT/Apache-2.0
compound_id Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
compound_id BSD-2-Clause OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
